_note: Phaedo Protocol §11.3 self-identification — the reference implementation's conformance statement. Kept honest by spec/test-schemas.mjs (protocol_version must match docs/protocol/v0.1.md; test_vector_results 'pass' set must match the populated spec/test-vectors/*.json). A third-party implementation publishes its own file in this shape.
implementation: Phaedo reference implementation (Chrome extension + MCP server)
level_0_surface: phaedo://fingerprint/projection (MCP resource) + the Section 9.3 response `projection` field — read-and-insert, no cryptography
